testcase.name: Mutant #1
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/immutable_list.py +++ pymonet/immutable_list.py @@ -1,7 +1,7 @@ from typing import TypeVar, Generic, Callable, Optional
-T = TypeVar('T') +T = TypeVar('XXTXX') U = TypeVar('U')

testcase.name: Mutant #2
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/immutable_list.py +++ pymonet/immutable_list.py @@ -1,7 +1,7 @@ from typing import TypeVar, Generic, Callable, Optional
-T = TypeVar('T') +T = None U = TypeVar('U')

testcase.name: Mutant #3
Mutant #4
Mutant #5
testcase.system-out: def __init__(self, head: T = None, tail: 'ImmutableList[T]' = None, is_empty: bool = False) -> None:

testcase.name: Mutant #13
Mutant #15
testcase.system-out: raise ValueError('ImmutableList: you can not add any other instace than ImmutableList')

testcase.name: Mutant #31
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/immutable_list.py +++ pymonet/immutable_list.py @@ -71,7 +71,7 @@ if self.tail is None: return [self.head]
- return [self.head, *self.tail.to_list()] + return [self.head, /self.tail.to_list()]
def append(self, new_element: T) -> 'ImmutableList[T]': """

testcase.name: Mutant #34
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/immutable_list.py +++ pymonet/immutable_list.py @@ -104,7 +104,7 @@ :type fn: Function(A) -> B :returns: ImmutableList[B] """ - if self.tail is None: + if self.tail is not None: return ImmutableList(fn(self.head))
return ImmutableList(fn(self.head), self.tail.map(fn))

testcase.name: Mutant #38
Mutant #43
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/task.py +++ pymonet/task.py @@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ :returns: resolved Task :rtype: Task[Function(_, resolve) -> A] """ - return Task(lambda _, resolve: resolve(value)) + return Task(lambda _, resolve: None)
@classmethod def reject(cls, value):

testcase.name: Mutant #45
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/task.py +++ pymonet/task.py @@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ :returns: rejected Task :rtype: Task[Function(reject, _) -> A] """ - return Task(lambda reject, _: reject(value)) + return Task(lambda reject, _: None)
def map(self, fn): """

testcase.name: Mutant #104
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/utils.py +++ pymonet/utils.py @@ -45,8 +45,6 @@ """ return value + 1
- -@curry def eq(value, value1) -> bool: return value == value1

testcase.name: Mutant #106
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/utils.py +++ pymonet/utils.py @@ -50,8 +50,6 @@ def eq(value, value1) -> bool: return value == value1
- -@curry def curried_map(mapper, collection): return [mapper(item) for item in collection]

testcase.name: Mutant #107
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/utils.py +++ pymonet/utils.py @@ -55,8 +55,6 @@ def curried_map(mapper, collection): return [mapper(item) for item in collection]
- -@curry def curried_filter(filterer, collection): return [item for item in collection if filterer(item)]

testcase.name: Mutant #108
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/utils.py +++ pymonet/utils.py @@ -60,8 +60,6 @@ def curried_filter(filterer, collection): return [item for item in collection if filterer(item)]
- -@curry def find(collection: List[T], key: Callable[[T], bool]): """ Return the first element of the list which matches the keys, or None if no element matches.

testcase.name: Mutant #110
testcase.failure: --- pymonet/utils.py +++ pymonet/utils.py @@ -91,7 +91,7 @@ """ return reduce( lambda current_value, function: function(current_value), - functions[::-1], + functions[::+1], value )

testcase.name: Mutant #111
testcase.failure: --- pymonet/utils.py +++ pymonet/utils.py @@ -91,7 +91,7 @@ """ return reduce( lambda current_value, function: function(current_value), - functions[::-1], + functions[::-2], value )

testcase.name: Mutant #114
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/utils.py +++ pymonet/utils.py @@ -154,7 +154,7 @@ cache: List[Any] = []
def memoized_fn(argument): - cached_result = find(cache, lambda cacheItem: key(cacheItem[0], argument)) + cached_result = find(cache, lambda cacheItem: key(cacheItem[1], argument)) if cached_result is not None: return cached_result[1] fn_result = fn(argument)
testcase.system-out: cached_result = find(cache, lambda cacheItem: key(cacheItem[0], argument))

testcase.name: Mutant #115
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/utils.py +++ pymonet/utils.py @@ -154,7 +154,7 @@ cache: List[Any] = []
def memoized_fn(argument): - cached_result = find(cache, lambda cacheItem: key(cacheItem[0], argument)) + cached_result = find(cache, lambda cacheItem: None) if cached_result is not None: return cached_result[1] fn_result = fn(argument)
testcase.system-out: cached_result = find(cache, lambda cacheItem: key(cacheItem[0], argument))

testcase.name: Mutant #116
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/utils.py +++ pymonet/utils.py @@ -154,7 +154,7 @@ cache: List[Any] = []
def memoized_fn(argument): - cached_result = find(cache, lambda cacheItem: key(cacheItem[0], argument)) + cached_result = None if cached_result is not None: return cached_result[1] fn_result = fn(argument)
testcase.system-out: cached_result = find(cache, lambda cacheItem: key(cacheItem[0], argument))

testcase.failure: --- pymonet/monad_try.py +++ pymonet/monad_try.py @@ -85,7 +85,7 @@ :returns: self :rtype: Try[A] """ - if not self.is_success: + if self.is_success: fail_callback(self.value) return self

testcase.failure:

-T = TypeVar('T') +T = None U = TypeVar('U') W = TypeVar('W')

testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/lazy.py +++ pymonet/lazy.py @@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
T = TypeVar('T') -U = TypeVar('U') +U = None W = TypeVar('W')

testcase.name: Mutant #139
Mutant #140
Mutant #143
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/lazy.py +++ pymonet/lazy.py @@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ :type constructor_fn: Function() -> A """ self.constructor_fn = constructor_fn - self.is_evaluated = False + self.is_evaluated = None self.value = None
def __str__(self) -> str: # pragma: no cover

testcase.name: Mutant #144
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/lazy.py +++ pymonet/lazy.py @@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ """ self.constructor_fn = constructor_fn self.is_evaluated = False - self.value = None + self.value = ""
def __str__(self) -> str: # pragma: no cover return 'Lazy[fn={}, value={}, is_evaluated={}]'.format(self.constructor_fn, self.value, self.is_evaluated)

testcase.name: Mutant #145
Mutant #149
testcase.failure: --- pymonet/lazy.py +++ pymonet/lazy.py @@ -29,8 +29,7 @@ Two Lazy are equals where both are evaluated both have the same value and constructor functions. """ return ( - isinstance(other, Lazy) - and self.is_evaluated == other.is_evaluated + isinstance(other, Lazy) or self.is_evaluated == other.is_evaluated and self.value == other.value and self.constructor_fn == other.constructor_fn )

testcase.name: Mutant #151
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/lazy.py +++ pymonet/lazy.py @@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ :returns: Lazy with function returning argument :rtype: Lazy[Function() -> A] """ - return Lazy(lambda *args: value) + return Lazy(lambda *args: None)
def _compute_value(self, *args): self.is_evaluated = True

testcase.name: Mutant #155
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/lazy.py +++ pymonet/lazy.py @@ -63,7 +63,7 @@ :returns: Lazy with mapped value :rtype: Lazy[Function() -> B)] """ - return Lazy(lambda *args: mapper(self.constructor_fn(*args))) + return Lazy(lambda *args: None)
def ap(self, applicative): """

testcase.name: Mutant #156
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/lazy.py +++ pymonet/lazy.py @@ -75,7 +75,7 @@ :returns: new Lazy with result of contains function :rtype: Lazy[B] """ - return Lazy(lambda *args: self.constructor_fn(applicative.get(*args))) + return Lazy(lambda *args: None)
def bind(self, fn: 'Callable[[U], Lazy[U, W]]') -> 'Lazy[T, W]': """

testcase.name: Mutant #157
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/lazy.py +++ pymonet/lazy.py @@ -87,7 +87,7 @@ :rtype: B """ def lambda_fn(*args): - computed_value = self._compute_value(*args) + computed_value = None return fn(computed_value).constructor_fn
return Lazy(lambda_fn)

testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/semigroups.py +++ pymonet/semigroups.py @@ -154,7 +154,7 @@ :returns: new Max with largest value :rtype: Max[A | B] """ - return Max(self.value if self.value > semigroup.value else semigroup.value) + return Max(self.value if self.value >= semigroup.value else semigroup.value)
class Min(Semigroup):
testcase.system-out: return Max(self.value if self.value > semigroup.value else semigroup.value)

testcase.name: Mutant #181
Mutant #182
Mutant #183
Mutant #184
testcase.failure: --- pymonet/semigroups.py +++ pymonet/semigroups.py @@ -174,5 +174,5 @@ :returns: new Min with smallest value :rtype: Min[A | B] """ - return Min(self.value if self.value <= semigroup.value else semigroup.value) + return Min(self.value if self.value < semigroup.value else semigroup.value)
testcase.system-out: return Min(self.value if self.value <= semigroup.value else semigroup.value)

testcase.name: Mutant #199
testcase.failure:
--- pymonet/validation.py +++ pymonet/validation.py @@ -141,7 +141,7 @@ """ from pymonet.lazy import Lazy
- return Lazy(lambda: self.value) + return Lazy(lambda: None)
def to_try(self): """
